problem_context.expected_behavior: Insert linklist_node immediately after linklist, preserving a well-formed circular doubly linked list and updating the abstract node sequence.
forbidden_patterns: field-only specification; broad repository search; algorithm mirror in Rocq
problem_context.problem_statement: Verify insertion after a node in a sentinel circular doubly linked list. The specification must own the complete list and a detached insertion node with separation logic, expose only the local neighbors needed for stores, and re-establish full forward/back consistency and the updated abstract address sequence. qcp-mcp is accessed through the QCP MCP session_manager with canonical -I/-slp. Never search or read QCP_demos_human.
spec_hint: Strictly mirror predicate-first single-list insert_after style, extended with both next and prev links and sentinel closure.
